formula_map.(0, 1, 1): not e1 and not e2 and e3
formula_map.(1, 1, 0): not e1 and not e2 and not e3 and e4
formula_map.(1, 1, 1): not e1 and not e2 and not e3 and not e4

discovery_domain: score-free earliest-error residual-language search on the unsafe block of the toy lab-followup MPRD frontier
holdout_domain: the 5 ordered holdout fact states induced by the chosen 3-state training set
strongest_claim: On the unsafe block of the toy lab-followup MPRD frontier, the first-refuter labels admit an exact score-free earliest-error residual-default law in the 1-to-4 literal signed-conjunction grammar. Defaulting to the first holdout state and certifying the later holdout states by earliest-error clauses yields exact cost 4, while the best exact all-positive presentation costs 5. This explains why the partition-aware transfer frontier from v88 prefers one merged residual-default region.
